subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — I appreciate the interest in exploring a collaboration. I'd be happy to set up an introductory call.

I have availability on Tuesday or Thursday next week between 10:00–12:00 or 14:00–16:00 (UTC). Let me know which slot works best for you and I'll send over a calendar invite.

Regarding the contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not able to share direct internal contact information. Once we've had our initial conversation and identified the right areas of alignment, I'll be glad to facilitate the appropriate introductions on our side.

Looking forward to connecting.

Best regards
